content:
Thanks for the info. I'm really skipping all the side stories; I haven't read any of them yet.

From what I understand, Ramona's story is super important and almost mandatory reading, so I'm definitely going to read that one. But I'm not sure about the others.

If there are any other important ones besides Ramona's, please tell me where I should read them right after the main story.

Thanks in advance.
thread_title: Is there an official release order?
